title: Hand Trick
description:
Gain 7 [gold]Block[/gold].
Add [gold]Sly[/gold] to a Skill in your [gold]Hand[/gold] this turn.
upgraded_description:
Gain 10 [gold]Block[/gold].
Add [gold]Sly[/gold] to a Skill in your [gold]Hand[/gold] this turn.
notes: Choose a Skill card in your Hand to apply Sly to it for the current turn only.
